summary: A Go-based modular tool for migrating, detecting, running, and reporting on infrastructure compliance tests with a Goss migration adapter and emerging dashboard capabilities.
concerns: generic 'go-code' directory names lack semantic clarity
untracked file in git status indicates possible incomplete commits
frequent 'chore: update intel metadata' commits suggest automated noise in history
docs/commands duplicates cmd/ structure potentially causing drift
suggestions: rename 'go-code' directories to reflect actual domain (e.g., 'handlers', 'services')
investigate and commit or gitignore the untracked file
consolidate command documentation to avoid duplication with source structure
focus on ROAD-035-03 roadmap items based on recent commit activity
